title: Cosmetic Megas [Cobblemon]
description: Permanent Megas? - Say no more. Equip your Mega Stone in the cosmetic slot to look at your "mega" forever!
body:
## What is Cosmetic Megas?

Lots of people always wanted permanent Megas and well, that would be incredibly unbalanced - so I talked to some the supporters and what y'all _seem_ to want is to look at the mega models instead. Well the compromise I made will allow you to do just that!     
With Cosmetic Megas you can equip a Pokémons Mega Stone in its _cosmetic slot_ which will visually change it into the mega.
## Addons that support Cosmetic Megas:
### [Lost Lore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poketwo) - Version 2.2.0+
  - Equip Slowbro**go**nite for Galarian Mega Slowbro
  - Equip Crystalline Steelixite for Crystal Mega Steelix
  - Equip Shadow Mewtwonite X for Shadow Mega Mewtwo X 
  - Equip Shadow Mewtwonite Y for Shadow Mega Mewtwo Y
### Your own Mega addon!?
  - If you have a Mega addon you would like to work with Cosmetic Megas hit me up!
  - Adding support for it _(for addons)_ is as simple as making a resolver and telling me to include the code to make it work with this!
## How it works:
1. Equip your Pokémon's specific Mega Stone in its _cosmetic item slot_ 
2. Done - it's that easy!

## Notes:
- Full support for MSD and Navas ZA Megas
- Rayquaza requires a regular - Raw Mega Stone
- No stat nor ability changes - it's 100% cosmetic
- You're able to use any gimmicks and form changes but your Pokémon will always keep the mega look until you remove the stone from the cosmetic slot
## How to and what version to install:
For most of you - just download the mod version. Do it manually, via the launcher or however you want    
For the few of you that prefer to keep things server-sided I added a resource & datapack version - y'all will know how to install that.
